rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANTS RECONTRUST COMPNAY, N.A. and BANK OF AMERICA, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO THIRD AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Third Amended Complaint is continued to December 10, 2012 on court's own motion. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND GARCIA VS. BENITA RAMOS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF RAYMOND GARCIA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudicaton is DENIED. As to the 1st cause of action contractual theory of recovery in MSA (disgorgement of rent) does not correspond to tort theory alleged in Complaint paragraphs 23-25 ($750,000 for distress and anguish). Additionally, as to 1st and 3rd causes of action Plaintiff fails to shift the burden as to damages re: "rental value." See CCC1941.3(c); Landlord-Tenant Rutter Guide 3:21.6; Quevedo v. Braga 140 Cal.App.3d Supp.1. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID CHOO et al VS. MS MISSION HOLDINGS, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Award Of Atty'S Fees
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT MS MISSION HOLDINGS, LLC's Motion For Award Of Attorney'S Fees. Defendant's Motion for Attorney's Fees is GRANTED in the amount to be determined by the Court. Defendant is required to provide copies of detailed billing invoices with a summary of hours expended on each task by 9:00 a.m. on November 15, 2012. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: SAM HUNT VS. PETER DOTY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney Fees; Memo Of P & A; Dec And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT PETER DOTY's Motion To Be Declared Prevailing Party And For Reasonable Attorney Fees. Defendant's Motion to be declared prevailing party and for attorney's fess is continued to November 29, 2012 per moving party. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: FEDERAL NATIONAL MORTGAGE ASSOCIATION VS. RENETTA CAIRO et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT RENETTA CAIRO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is overruled, 5 days to answer. Notice sufficiently apprises defendant of advice availability from Rent Board. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLE DONN VS. FREDERICK C BOWLES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motioin To Quash Service Of Summons
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT FREDERICK BOWLES' Motioin To Quash Service Of Summons. Defendant's Motion to Quash is GRANTED as to 10/24/2012 service. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT GRIGGI et al VS. IRMA SANCHEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 7. PLAINTIFFs ROBERT GRIGGI and KAREN GRIGGI's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Hearing Required. = (KS/501)

rulings.Case Title: THANH K PHAN et al VS. ROBERTO SANCHEZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 14, 2012, line 8. DEFENDANT ROBERTO SANCHEZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer is overruled, 5 days to answer. Complaint is sufficiently alleged and is not uncertain. Reg. 6.15C may be asserted as affirmative defense. = (KS/501)
